properties.titulo_evento: Huge fascist-era underground cisterns draw Western special forces to Italy for tunnel training

properties.descricao: Alongside Ukraine and Moldova, six Western Balkan nations wish to join the European Union.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela's Dancing Devils revive centuries-old Corpus Christi rite

properties.descricao: Families gathered in Gaza City to mourn relatives killed on 4 June after overnight Israeli airstrikes in Gaza City, according to local hospitals.

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea quietly ramps up its nuclear program
